phase_a.evidence: bin/alm only (commit c0f196f). All 7 observe verbs exposed in --help. `alm validate` passes both files. cmd_add/cmd_triage callers preserved via basename inference. observe) dispatch registered.

dimensions.name: correctness
dimensions.evidence: All seven verbs function per AC. add/list/show/activate/resolve/dismiss/on-archive exercised. activate idempotent; resolve lifecycle-gated and kind-flag-validated; dismiss gated; activate on non-manual trigger exits 2; alm validate no-arg and basename-inferred both pass. AC1-AC12 verified.

dimensions.name: spec-compliance
dimensions.evidence: bin/alm:1617 cmd_observe dispatches 7 spec verbs. bin/alm:902 cmd_validate is thin dispatcher matching spec pseudocode. bin/alm:19-20 declares SCHEMA_FILE_TODOS/OBSERVATIONS. bin/alm:1695 _observe_compute_activation implements AD-4 pull model. bin/alm:1674 _observe_write_validated wraps every mutation atomically.

dimensions.name: code-quality
dimensions.evidence: set -eu preserved. No // empty jq-isms in yq. Errors to stderr (9 redirects). Atomic write pattern consistent. Exit codes consistent (1 user-input, 2 semantic/validation).

dimensions.name: unplanned-changes
dimensions.evidence: git show --name-only c0f196f: bin/alm + rws-managed state.json/summary.md only.

dimensions.name: test-coverage
dimensions.evidence: Each verb exercised by smoke: add×4, list×4 filters, show, resolve watch+decision-review+wrong-kind, dismiss with --reason, activate idempotent + non-manual rejection, validate both-file and basename modes. on-archive covered by static review (bin/alm:2332-2398).
